languages.text: {n}Лицо раненого кривится в гримасе плохо скрываемой ненависти.{/n} "Значит, шантаж. Я вынужден принять ваше решение и подчинюсь ему, но не думайте, что я хоть на секунду забуду об этом".

{n}The wounded man's face twists in a grimace of poorly concealed hatred.{/n} "Blackmail, then. I'm forced to accept your decision and submit to it, but don't think I'll forget this moment even for a second."
languages.original_text: {n}Лицо раненого кривится в гримасе плохо скрываемой ненависти.{/n} "Значит, шантаж. Я вынужден принять ваше решение и подчинюсь ему, но не думайте, что я хоть на секунду забуду об этом".

traits.locale_text: {n}The wounded man's face twists in a grimace of poorly concealed hatred.{/n} "Blackmail, then. I'm forced to accept your decision and submit to it, but don't think I'll forget this moment even for a second."

{n}The wounded man's face twists in a grimace of poorly concealed hatred.{/n} "Blackmail, then. I'm forced to accept your decision and submit to it, but don't think I'll forget this moment even for a second."

{n}The wounded man's face twists in a grimace of poorly concealed hatred.{/n} "Blackmail, then. I'm forced to accept your decision and submit to it, but don't think I'll forget this moment even for a second."

languages.text: {n}El rostro del herido se retuerce en una mueca de odio apenas contenido.{/n} «Chantaje. Me veo forzado a aceptar su decisión y someterme a ella, pero no piense que olvidaré este momento ni por un segundo».
languages.original_text: {n}The wounded man's face twists in a grimace of poorly concealed hatred.{/n} "Blackmail, then. I'm forced to accept your decision and submit to it, but don't think I'll forget this moment even for a second."

traits.locale_text: {n}El rostro del herido se retuerce en una mueca de odio apenas contenido.{/n} «Chantaje. Me veo forzado a aceptar su decisión y someterme a ella, pero no piense que olvidaré este momento ni por un segundo».

languages.text: {n}受伤的男人面容扭曲，恨意难掩。{/n}“原来是敲诈。我只能被迫接受并服从你的决定，但别指望我会忘记这一刻。一秒都不会。”
languages.original_text: {n}The wounded man's face twists in a grimace of poorly concealed hatred.{/n} "Blackmail, then. I'm forced to accept your decision and submit to it, but don't think I'll forget this moment even for a second."

traits.locale_text: {n}受伤的男人面容扭曲，恨意难掩。{/n}“原来是敲诈。我只能被迫接受并服从你的决定，但别指望我会忘记这一刻。一秒都不会。”

languages.text: {n}Une grimace de haine mal dissimulée déforme le visage du blessé.{/n} « Du chantage ? Je n'ai d'autre choix que d'accepter votre décision et de m'y soumettre, mais laissez-moi vous dire que je ne suis pas près de l'oublier. »
languages.original_text: {n}The wounded man's face twists in a grimace of poorly concealed hatred.{/n} "Blackmail, then. I'm forced to accept your decision and submit to it, but don't think I'll forget this moment even for a second."

traits.locale_text: {n}Une grimace de haine mal dissimulée déforme le visage du blessé.{/n} « Du chantage ? Je n'ai d'autre choix que d'accepter votre décision et de m'y soumettre, mais laissez-moi vous dire que je ne suis pas près de l'oublier. »

languages.text: {n}Yaralı adamın yüzü, kötü gizlenmiş bir nefret ifadesiyle buruşuyor.{/n} "Şantaj. Kararınızı kabul etmeye ve ona boyun eğmeye mecburum ama bu anı bir saniye bile unutacağımı sanmayın."
languages.original_text: {n}The wounded man's face twists in a grimace of poorly concealed hatred.{/n} "Blackmail, then. I'm forced to accept your decision and submit to it, but don't think I'll forget this moment even for a second."

traits.locale_text: {n}Yaralı adamın yüzü, kötü gizlenmiş bir nefret ifadesiyle buruşuyor.{/n} "Şantaj. Kararınızı kabul etmeye ve ona boyun eğmeye mecburum ama bu anı bir saniye bile unutacağımı sanmayın."

languages.text: {n}Der verwundete Mann verzieht sein Gesicht zu einer hasserfüllten Grimasse.{/n} "Erpressung also. Ich bin gezwungen, mich Eurer Entscheidung zu beugen, aber denkt nicht, dass ich diesen Moment auch nur eine Sekunde vergessen werde."
languages.original_text: {n}The wounded man's face twists in a grimace of poorly concealed hatred.{/n} "Blackmail, then. I'm forced to accept your decision and submit to it, but don't think I'll forget this moment even for a second."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der verwundete Mann verzieht sein Gesicht zu einer hasserfüllten Grimasse.{/n} "Erpressung also. Ich bin gezwungen, mich Eurer Entscheidung zu beugen, aber denkt nicht, dass ich diesen Moment auch nur eine Sekunde vergessen werde."

languages.text: {n}傷ついた男の顔は、隠そうともしない憎悪の表情を浮かべていた。{/n}「脅迫か。君の決断を受け入れ、従うしかないが、この瞬間を一瞬たりとも忘れないだろう。」
languages.original_text: {n}The wounded man's face twists in a grimace of poorly concealed hatred.{/n} "Blackmail, then. I'm forced to accept your decision and submit to it, but don't think I'll forget this moment even for a second."

traits.locale_text: {n}傷ついた男の顔は、隠そうともしない憎悪の表情を浮かべていた。{/n}「脅迫か。君の決断を受け入れ、従うしかないが、この瞬間を一瞬たりとも忘れないだろう。」
